title: Sanger Sequencing
author: Lívia Sacchetto
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.pxddpi6

steps.instruction: In a 0.2 mL microtube, place the items below: %s %s PCR product 20 to 30 ng of DNA per 100 bp Primer Forward or Reverse 10 pmol BigDye™ Terminator v3.1 5X Sequencing Buffer (Applied Biosystems) 2 µL Nuclease-free water to a final volume total of 10,0 μL
Pipette each reaction from the tube into the corresponding well of the sequencing plate (10 µL).
Seal the plate; centrifuge briefly to collect the contents of the wells at the bottom. Protect from extended light exposure or elevated temperatures before cycling.
Use Sanger sequencing with the Applied Biosystems® 3730 DNA Analyser, according to the manufacturer's instructions.
